name: Sidebar Workspace Application Layout

source.package: Business Travel Request 0.8.85 Codex Lite Fresh - Yeeflow App Plan-v1.1.yapk

navigationIconRules.hiddenProcessIconException: Hidden process/task navigation entries may retain Yeeflow built-in process icons such as wait-task, receive-task, done-task, and apply-task.

usageRules: Generated applications must use this template as the default application layout unless another approved Yeeflow application layout is explicitly selected.
The package must materialize the template through decoded.ListSet.LayoutView.sortVer and decoded.ListSet.LayoutView.attrs.
The header height, typography, text color, background color, navigation position, navigation text color, and navigation background color must match this template.
Visible menu groups and menu items must include suitable FontAwesome icons selected for the business resource.
Application layout chrome must remain separate from the application control style Themes contract.
